handling_note: Remove loose membrane and visible fat as desired. Do not rinse raw chicken. Pat dry and even the thickness before seasoning.
timing_note: Fresh raw chicken breast cooks quickly but needs attention.
cooking_note: Cook until the thickest part reaches 165°F.

handling_note: Remove packaging and use a covered or moist method unless thawed first.
timing_note: Frozen raw chicken breast needs extra passive time.
cooking_note: Verify that the thickest part reaches 165°F.

handling_note: Slice shred or dice before reheating.
timing_note: Cooked chicken breast is mostly reheating and assembly.
cooking_note: Reheat gently until hot without drying it out.
